h3: Keep your professional requirements up to date with free, on-demand courses and Lunch & Learn seminars approved for CE credit. Heat & Glo partners with top architectural, engineering and construction trade associations to help you learn from industry experts.
Match the right fireplace to clients

paragraphs: Keep your professional requirements up to date with free, on-demand courses and Lunch & Learn seminars approved for CE credit. Heat & Glo partners with top architectural, engineering and construction trade associations to help you learn from industry experts.

Browse our catalog to access free, self-paced fireplace webinars and earn CEUs from courses approved by the American Institute of Architects (AIA) and Interior Design Continuing Education Council (IDCEC).

We’ve also partnered with Hanley Wood University, a leading online education platform. Once you’ve completed a CEU, your credits automatically go to your chosen association, and you can download certificates of completion. Create a free account to begin. Courses include:
Schedule a free fireplace seminar for your firm or business today—an excellent way to earn CE credits virtually or in-person.
To groups over five we offer one-hour fireplace courses approved for credit by the AIA, IDCEC and the National Association of the Remodeling Industry (NARI). Fill out the form and we’ll be in touch.
Specifying Gas Fireplaces For Today's Homes - 1 LU. AIA/IDCEC HSW. A gas fireplaces 101 course. Learn the basics: Styles, Technologies, and key specification criteria.
Fireplaces and Fire Features for Commercial Design - 1 LU. AIA/IDCEC HSW. Learn how to leverage fire as a signature focal point for commercial and multi-family programs.
A representative will contact you shortly.
Need help? Connect with a specialist to ensure you select the right fireplace for your residential or commercial plans.
